name: Cloud SQL instance has a public IP address
description: The Cloud SQL instance has IPv4 (public IP) enabled. A publicly accessible database is reachable from the internet over the SQL port. Even with authorized networks configured, the public endpoint is exposed to brute-force and protocol-level attacks, and a misconfigured authorized network can allow unrestricted access.
remediation: Disable the public IP on the instance: Cloud Console → SQL → Edit → Connections → Private IP only. Use Private Service Connect or VPC peering for application connectivity. Migrate network access to private IP to eliminate the public attack surface entirely.
